name: multi-track-release
description: Release to multiple tracks simultaneously (internal, alpha, beta) with different release notes per track. Uses upload once, then parallel releases.

steps.name: upload_aab
steps.description: Upload AAB once to be used across all tracks

steps.name: prepare_release_notes_internal
steps.description: Prepare release notes for internal track

steps.name: prepare_release_notes_alpha
steps.description: Prepare release notes for alpha track

steps.name: prepare_release_notes_beta
steps.description: Prepare release notes for beta track

steps.name: release_internal
steps.description: Release to internal track with internal notes (COMPLETED status)
steps.command: gpd publish release --package ${env.PACKAGE} --track internal --version-code ${steps.upload_aab.versionCode} --status completed --release-name '${env.RELEASE_NAME} Internal (${env.BUILD_VERSION})' --release-notes internal-release-notes.txt

steps.name: release_alpha
steps.description: Release to alpha track with alpha notes (COMPLETED status)
steps.command: gpd publish release --package ${env.PACKAGE} --track alpha --version-code ${steps.upload_aab.versionCode} --status completed --release-name '${env.RELEASE_NAME} Alpha (${env.BUILD_VERSION})' --release-notes alpha-release-notes.txt

steps.name: release_beta
steps.description: Release to beta track with beta notes (IN_PROGRESS status for staged rollout)
steps.command: gpd publish release --package ${env.PACKAGE} --track beta --version-code ${steps.upload_aab.versionCode} --status inProgress --user-fraction 0.50 --release-name '${env.RELEASE_NAME} Beta (${env.BUILD_VERSION})' --release-notes beta-release-notes.txt

steps.name: wait_for_tracks
steps.description: Wait for all track releases to stabilize
steps.command: echo 'All tracks released. Internal: completed, Alpha: completed, Beta: 50% rollout' && sleep 30

steps.name: check_track_health
steps.description: Quick health check across all tracks
steps.command: echo 'Checking health across all tracks...' && echo 'Internal Track: Released to all internal testers' && echo 'Alpha Track: Released to all alpha testers' && echo 'Beta Track: Rolling out to 50% of beta testers'

steps.name: final_summary
steps.command: echo '========================================' && echo 'Multi-Track Release Complete' && echo '========================================' && echo 'Package: ${env.PACKAGE}' && echo 'Version Code: ${steps.upload_aab.versionCode}' && echo 'SHA256: ${steps.upload_aab.sha256}' && echo '' && echo 'Track Status:' && echo '  - Internal: Released (all testers)' && echo '  - Alpha: Released (all testers)' && echo '  - Beta: Rolling out (50% of testers)' && echo '========================================'
